name: AirPods (1/2 generation) Case with Clip - heyday™ Poppy Flowers
description:
The AirPods (1/2 generation) Case with Clip from heyday™ Poppy Flowers adds a sweet vibe to your accessories. Made from durable material, this case is compatible with wireless charging and includes a flip cover for easy access. The attached carabiner offers convenient portability, allowing you to clip it to bags or belts. Designed specifically for Apple AirPods (2nd generation, 2019) and Apple AirPods (1st generation, 2016), it combines style and functionality in an instant.

heyday™: Let your style speak volumes.
